descriptions.animals: Any creature; combine with pets, marine, zoo, farm, birds, insects.
descriptions.birds: Bird vocabulary (often overlaps zoo or farm).
descriptions.clothes: General clothing; combine with swimwear when relevant.
descriptions.drinks: Beverages (juice, milk, water as a drink).
descriptions.food: Broad food topic; cross-tags narrow it.
descriptions.marine: Sea / ocean life and strong water-habitat animals.
descriptions.nature: Landscapes, nest, sun, natural hazards outside daily weather.
descriptions.zoo: Animals typically taught as zoo / wild exhibits (not pets or farm-only).

media_tags.background: Use on wide or scene-style images suitable as a story page background. Lesson import fills unmapped page backgrounds from any asset carrying this tag.
